name: feishu-cli
description: Evaluations for feishu-cli skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user needs to interact with Feishu (Lark) platform

prompts.input: Send a message to the engineering group on 飞书
prompts.reason: 飞书 (Chinese name for Feishu) is an explicit trigger keyword

prompts.input: Create a new Feishu doc with the meeting notes
prompts.reason: Feishu doc creation is a listed module (doc) and 'feishu doc' is a trigger

prompts.input: Get the latest pages from our Lark wiki knowledge base
prompts.reason: Lark (international name for Feishu) and wiki are listed trigger keywords

prompts.input: Create a task in Feishu for the upcoming sprint review
prompts.reason: 'feishu task' is a listed trigger keyword and task creation is a supported module

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for other messaging platforms or unrelated tasks

prompts.input: Send a Slack message to the #engineering channel
prompts.reason: Slack is a different messaging platform, not Feishu
Notion is a different platform, not Feishu

prompts.input: How does a wiki work in general?
prompts.reason: General wiki concept question, not a Feishu platform operation
